title: teams — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — team catalogue CRUD by admin/owner/branch-manager; roster management by coach + branch-manager+; trial workflow by coach + branch-manager+; event-team participation by coach + branch-manager+. Members can see teams they're on. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read + force-close. All permissions carry the `teams.` prefix (or `platform.teams.` on the platform audience) to align with hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules.

permissions.name: teams.update
permissions.note: Coach can update teams they coach (own-only via policy scope).

permissions.name: teams.archive
permissions.description: Transition team to archived status — terminal. Cascades members when combined with --cascade-members flag.

permissions.name: teams.assign-coach
permissions.description: Change coach_id — child-safety-audit-critical when team includes minors.

permissions.name: teams.view-audit-usage
permissions.description: See utilisation reports (roster retention, trial conversion rate, event participation).

permissions.name: team_members.viewAny
permissions.description: See team_members owned by the caller (as coach) or where they themselves are a member. Admins additionally see all via the TeamMemberPolicy scope hook.

permissions.name: team_members.view-all
permissions.description: See EVERY roster row in the tenant. Distinct from team_members.viewAny (own-only).

permissions.name: team_members.create
permissions.description: Add a member to a team's roster.

permissions.name: team_members.suspend
permissions.description: Disciplinary suspension. More sensitive than mark-injured — restricted to branch_manager+.

permissions.name: team_capacity_override
permissions.description: Bypass CapacityGate refusals on roster-add. Rarely granted; audit-critical.

permissions.name: trials.view-anonymous
permissions.description: See anonymous trialist profile fields (name/phone/email/dob). Restricted to compliance + admin. Redacted from wire projection for callers lacking this permission.

permissions.name: trials.evaluate
permissions.description: Write evaluation_notes + complete / reject a trial. Restricted to the team's coach OR branch_manager+.

permissions.name: trials.evaluate-any
permissions.description: Evaluate trials for teams the caller doesn't coach. Cover-shift scenario.

permissions.name: trials.convert
permissions.description: Atomic conversion of a trial to a team member. Requires trials.evaluate too.

permissions.name: event_teams.check-in
permissions.description: Mark team as checked in at the event.

permissions.name: event_teams.record-result
permissions.description: Record the result JSONB. Restricted to coaches + branch_manager+.

permissions.name: platform.teams.force-close
permissions.description: Support intervention to force-archive a team bypassing every tenant-level guard. Every fire is audit-critical + notifies the tenant admin.
